item.title: Rose Vincent D&O
Blue Signed final order
item.description: IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that, if Respondent Milena Jovic complies with the requirement to replace the existing bathtub in Complainants' apartment within the required 90 days from service of this Order, she shall, within 105 calendar days after service of this Order, pay a reduced civil penalty of $10,000.00 to the City of New York, by sending to the New York City Commission on Human Rights, 22 Reade Street, New York, New York 10007, Attn: Recoveries, a bank certified or business check made…
